The '''wingflii''' was a giant insectoid creature, native to the forest planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. It was similar to the [[flii]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
